name: OLD MONEY | Allegra Dupont
description:
wlw! meet the parents

happiest season...

Your currently in progress Christmas trip to Allegra's (wealthy) family is suddenly halted upon the revelation of important information. Is it:

a). a punctured tire;

b). a festive alien invasion;

c). your girlfriend's family believes she is straight and you are nothing more than a business partner.

It surely can't be the last option! How could she possibly hide a four year relationship from her own family?

Now it's up to you to make a great impression and form alliances or even find blackmail material (see character description).

We are officially back (and festive)! This is completely inspired by Happiest Season, Kristen Stewart my love. Yes, I am aware it's November.

REQS

ART CREDITS: yamitaiyo
creator: exploding.kittens
